title: Error Classes, Discriminated Results, Causes, Retry, and Session Recovery
description: Catch blocks treat unknown as Error without narrowing, HTTP and validation failures share prose, retry wraps non-idempotent state transitions, causes are lost, and any rejection closes the session. Learners cumulatively produce causal typed recovery decision model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Treat caught values as unknown and normalize Error, DOMException, abort reasons, and non-Error throws at one boundary.
Represent input, not-found, HTTP, network, timeout, abort, validation, invariant, storage, and internal failures as exhaustive variants.
Retain safe causal chains and operation identity while separating internal diagnostics from user-facing recovery text.
